Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Arbitrator Assigned Directly

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Attendance And Testimony At Deposition Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KRISTIN E. CHARBONNIER, ESQ. of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel No. 925-225-6838 appearing for Defendants Sharon Zeng and Richard Zeng;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS SHARON ZENG AND RICHARD ZENG'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff Attendance And Testimony At Deposition Request For Monetary Sanctions, the Defendant's motion to compel the attendance of the Plaintiff at deposition is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed. The Defendant's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $674.65, payable within 10 days of notice of entry of order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KRISTIN E. CHARBONNIER, ESQ. of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel No. 925-225-6838 appearing for Defendants Sharon Zeng and Richard Zeng;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS SHARON ZENG AND RICHARD ZENG'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests Request For Monetary Sanctions, the Defendants' motion to compel responses to discovery requests is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed. The Defendant's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $674.65, payable within 10 days of notice of entry of order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
